ApplyKit, AuraForge, and IncidentReview continue from their canonical root repos only, with no duplicate active .batch surface.
All five titles remain correctly housed in Local Portfolio Projects with zero exact-title duplicates in Project Portfolio.
Each project keeps exactly one active GitHub repo source row and no Needs Mapping source row.
ApplyKit, AuraForge, and IncidentReview no longer have a remaining batch-05 product-slice finding; any future work is a separate maintenance or automation lane.
